name: Northwest Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker currns, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 250 degrees F and continue baking for an additional hour.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim.
10. Chill thoroughly.
11. Top with cherry pie filling just before serving.
Variation:
Substitute 1 1/2 cups finely chopped nuts and 2 tablespoons sugar for graham cracker currns and sugar.
